title: 今天表现最最棒
event:
幼儿园门口，姥姥在排队等着进幼儿园接水水，姥姥永远排在宝宝班的第一名。其他还有几排，有小班的中班的大班的。
到班级门口，姥姥最先到，刘老师第一个叫水水，水水拿着自己的玩具（一只朱迪警官的毛绒玩具）开心的跑了出来。刘老师告诉姥姥，水水今天可棒了，三顿饭都吃得可香了，中午也自己睡的，呼呼睡得可好了。刘老师给水水比个大拇哥。
回到家，水水在沙发上给毛绒玩具上课，一会妈妈就回来了。水水开心的跑到门口迎接妈妈，跟妈妈说刘老师今天表扬我了，因为我吃得好睡得好。妈妈抱着水水猛亲了一口。小宝真是太棒了。水水牵着妈妈的手，在客厅开心的拼起了磁力片。

pages.scene: 美和园幼儿园门口，各班级接娃队伍整齐排列，绵羊姥姥站在宝宝班队伍最前面，橘猫小黄蹲在她脚边
pages.narration: 春天的幼儿园门口，姥姥排第一个等水水
pages.image_prompt: Grandma Sheep, a fluffy old woman dressed in a light beige knitted cardigan, a light gray linen dress, and cloth shoes, stood in line outside Meiheyuan Kindergarten, waiting for her turn. Other animal parents were also queuing. There were three lines in total, and she was first in the baby class line. A sign next to her read "Baby Class." Next to her were the toddler class and the preschool class. A chubby orange tabby cat named Xiaohuang, with a bell around its neck, sat at her feet. A warm spring breeze caressed her face, and soft golden sunlight streamed in. The scene used bright and warm colors, with a style similar to the CG animation of "Zootopia" and the illustrations in a children's book style, creating a cute and friendly atmosphere. The lighting was soft, the composition simple, and the quality high.

pages.scene: 宝宝班教室门口，长颈鹿刘老师笑着拉开门，穿粉白碎花裙的水水抱着朱迪毛绒玩具开心跑向姥姥，小黄蹲在台阶边
pages.narration: 放学啦！刘老师第一个叫水水的名字
pages.dialogue: 刘老师：“水水，姥姥来接你啦！”
pages.image_prompt: A tall, slender, spotted giraffe-like teacher, Ms. Liu, stands smiling at the classroom door, wearing a light blue short-sleeved shirt and jeans. Three-and-a-half-year-old Shui Shui, dressed in a pink and white floral spring dress with a pink cardigan, white shoes, and a pink bow in her hair, runs from the classroom towards her grandmother and Xiao Huang, clutching a Judy Hopps plush toy. The background is a kindergarten corridor, lined with children's artwork. The visual style is reminiscent of Zootopia CG animation, with children's picture book illustrations, soft and warm lighting, and lively, adorable characters—high-quality production.

pages.scene: 刘老师弯腰对着姥姥和水水比大拇指，水水举着朱迪玩具歪头笑，小黄蹭着姥姥的裤腿
pages.narration: 刘老师夸水水吃饭香，午睡也睡得特别好
pages.dialogue: 刘老师：“水水今天三顿饭都吃光，午睡超乖哦！”
pages.image_prompt: Giraffe Teacher Liu bending over, giving a thumbs up to Shuishui and grandma, Shuishui holding Judy plush tilting head and grinning, Xiao Huang rubbing against grandma's trouser leg, kindergarten corridor background, warm spring light, Zootopia style CG animation, children's picture book illustration, bright warm tones, cute expressions, high quality

pages.scene: 水水牵着姥姥的手走在回家的小路上，路边开着淡紫色小野花，小黄蹦蹦跳跳跑在前面
pages.narration: 水水抱着朱迪警官，蹦蹦跳跳跟姥姥回家
pages.image_prompt: Shuishui holding grandma's hand walking on sidewalk, small purple wildflowers growing along roadside, Xiao Huang bouncing ahead with bell jangling, warm spring afternoon sunlight, green trees in background, Zootopia style CG animation, children's picture book illustration, soft cheerful color palette, cute dynamic poses, high quality

pages.scene: 家里客厅，水水坐在专属兔子小椅子上，对着朱迪毛绒玩具“讲课”，小黄趴在她脚边打盹
pages.narration: 到家啦，水水当小老师，给朱迪警官上课~
pages.dialogue: 水水：“小手放好哦，今天我们学数数！”
pages.image_prompt: Shuishui sitting on her small bunny-shaped children chair in living room, teaching Judy plush toy, oak hardwood floor, muted blue-gray L-shaped sofa in background, Xiao Huang napping at her feet, soft warm indoor light, Zootopia style CG animation, children's picture book illustration, cozy home atmosphere, high quality

pages.scene: 家门口传来钥匙转动声，穿米黄碎花衬衫的兔妈妈刚推开门，水水踮脚往门口跑，小黄跟在她脚边
pages.narration: 叮咚！妈妈下班回到家啦
pages.image_prompt: A fluffy white mother rabbit, dressed in a light yellow floral shirt, light blue jeans, and white sneakers, is opening the front door. Shui Shui runs towards her (her back to the camera), followed closely by Xiao Huang. The cozy entryway background, warm lighting, Zootopia-style CG animation, children's book illustrations, excited and happy expressions, and high-quality visuals all contribute to the cozy atmosphere.

pages.scene: 妈妈蹲下来把水水抱在怀里，笑着亲她的小脸蛋，水水举着朱迪玩具晃呀晃
pages.narration: 水水告诉妈妈，今天得到了老师的表扬~
pages.dialogue: 水水：“老师说我吃饭睡觉都超棒！”妈妈：“我的小宝太厉害啦！”
pages.image_prompt: Rabbit mom squatting down, hugging Shuishui and kissing her cheek, Shuishui holding Judy plush shaking happily, Xiao Huang rubbing against mom's leg, entryway with shoe rack in background, soft warm lighting, Zootopia style CG animation, children's picture book illustration, loving warm atmosphere, high quality

pages.scene: 客厅地板上，水水牵着妈妈的手一起拼彩色磁力片，小黄趴在旁边玩掉下来的磁力片
pages.narration: 水水牵着妈妈的手，开心地拼起了好玩的磁力片
pages.dialogue: 水水：“妈妈你看！我拼了个艾莎城堡！”
pages.image_prompt: Shuishui holding mom's hand, playing with colorful magnetic tiles on oak hardwood floor, L-shaped blue-gray sofa in background, Xiao Huang lying beside playing with a small magnetic tile, warm soft indoor light, Zootopia style CG animation, children's picture book illustration, happy cozy family scene, bright warm tones, high quality
